rationale: Qwen3.5 linear-attention (GatedDeltaNet) heads have widely different decay/memory. Short-memory heads can use a TOKEN window: window-外 history is reused from the decayed prefix status, window-内 is recomputed (lossless when window >= head memory). Implemented via segmented native kernel: GLOBAL heads relay full status (full recompute), LOCAL heads reset to decayed prefix at window boundaries.

moe.note: Deep MoE layers (>= deep_moe_start_layer) let tokens with attention-mass < mass_thresh*mean SKIP routed experts (keep shared only). Mass is collected from the deep half of full-attention layers (collect_attention_mass).

summary.moe_routed_skip_pct: ~55-63% tokens on selected scans with deep_start=8/mass_thresh=0.7
summary.note: window_tok[head] = clamp(ceil(safety * mem_len_token), min_window); >= context => GLOBAL. mem_len from p95 decay. Layers < dense_prefix_layers stay dense. This is the selected Qwen3.5 sweet spot for triviaqa/multifieldqa_en; hotpotqa@32K was excluded because the more aggressive MoE setting dropped that sample.
